calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-12-2019 Vacated

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Sep-19-2018 Set For Trial On Jul-15-19 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 206

DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Aug-16-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANT ANDRIGHETTO PRODUCE INC., D/B/A SHASTA PRODUCE's DEMURRER TO 1ST AMENDED COMPLAINT - Defendant Andrighetto Produce Incorporated's demurrer to the fourth through tenth causes of action in the first amended complaint filed by plaintiff Guadalupe Hernandez Gomez is sustained without leave to amend as to the ninth cause of action and overruled as to all other causes of action. Liberally construed, the fourth through eighth and tenth causes of action all contain sufficient allegations of ultimate facts supporting Ms. Gomez's claims for violations of FEHA and CFRA, discrimination, failure to accommodate, retaliation and wrongful termination. The fourth, sixth and seventh causes of action adequately allege that Ms. Gomez was qualified to do her job and her employment was terminated because of her pregnancy, pregnancy-related disability and gender. The fifth cause of action adequately alleges that Ms. Gomez was qualified to do her job and she requested reasonable accommodations which were ignored or denied. The eighth cause of action adequately alleges that Ms. Gomez was qualified to do her job and that her employment was terminated because she requested pregnancy-related medical leave. The tenth cause of action adequately alleges that Ms. Gomez was qualified to do her job and her employment was terminated because she requested reasonable accommodations. The demurrer to the fourth through eighth and tenth causes of action appear to be based on a misapprehension that Ms. Gomez is required to allege evidentiary, rather than ultimate, facts to withstand a pleading challenge. The ninth cause of action is entirely duplicative of the fifth cause of action and Ms. Gomez fails to explain why she needs two identical claims entitled "Failure to Accommodate" based on the same alleged facts. Order signed in open court. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR# 8600 =302/hk

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Continued To Oct-03-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar May-07-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearances. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

DEFENDANT ANDRIGHETTO PRODUCE INC., D/B/A SHASTA PRODUCE, ANDRIGHETTO PRODUCE INCORPORATED's DEMURRER TO PLAINTIFF'S COMPLAINT.

Defendants' demurrer to all ten causes of action in the complaint filed by plaintiff Guadalupe Gomez is off calendar. Ms. Gomez's request to file a first amended complaint is granted, comports with California's liberal policy of allowing amendments to pleadings at any stage of a case (particularly an early stage as here), and moots the demurrer to the complaint. Ms. Gomez must file a first amended complaint no later than May 17, 2018.

Counsel for Ms. Gomez is required to prepare a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the Court's in compliance with CRC 3.1312.

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Court Reporter: Maria Torreano, CSR#8600, torreanom@aol.com, Reported. (D302/HK)
